title: SolarWatch — Mobile
description: Mobile-optimised SolarWatch dashboard. Key live stats, today's totals and power charts.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, battery_soc
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND battery_soc IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Battery SOC
panels.description: Current battery state of charge as a percentage. Sourced from the battery BMS via the inverter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  ROUND(
    CASE WHEN load_kwh > 0
    THEN LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, (1 - grid_kwh / NULLIF(load_kwh, 0)) * 100))
    ELSE 0 END
  ::numeric, 1) as "Self Sufficiency (%)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    COALESCE((SELECT MIN(val) FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_load_energy as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_load_energy IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_load_energy > 0
  AND daily_load_energy < 100
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)), 1) as load_kwh,
    COALESCE((SELECT MAX(val) FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_grid_import as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_grid_import IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_grid_import > 0
  AND daily_grid_import < 500
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)), 0) as grid_kwh
) t

panels.title: Self-Sufficiency Today
panels.description: Percentage of today's total load that was met by solar and battery without grid power. 100% = fully off-grid today. Formula: (1 − grid_import ÷ total_load) × 100.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, battery_voltage
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND battery_voltage IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Battery V
panels.description: Current battery terminal voltage. Indicates charge level — fully charged is typically 54–55V for a 48V LiFePO4 bank.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, battery_temp
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND battery_temp IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Battery Temp
panels.description: Battery pack temperature reported by the BMS. High temperatures (>45°C) may indicate heavy charge/discharge cycles.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, inverter_temp
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND inverter_temp IS NOT NULL
AND inverter_temp < 100
ORDER BY inverter_name ASC, time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv Temp
panels.description: Internal temperature of the first inverter's power stage. Normal operating range is 40–75°C.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(latest_pv) as "Total PV (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name,
    pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power, 0) as latest_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND pv1_power IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

panels.title: ☀️ Solar
panels.description: Combined solar PV output across all inverters at the latest poll. Sum of all MPPT strings.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(latest_load) as "Total Load (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name,
    load_power as latest_load
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND load_power IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

panels.title: 🏠 Load
panels.description: Total load power being consumed across all inverters at the latest poll.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(latest_grid) as "Grid Power (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name,
    grid_power as latest_grid
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND grid_power IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

panels.title: ⚡ Grid
panels.description: Combined grid power draw across all inverters. Positive = importing from grid.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, grid_voltage
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND grid_voltage IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Grid Voltage
panels.description: Grid supply voltage as measured by Inverter 1. Normal range for SA is 220–240V.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(val) as "Today PV (kWh)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_pv_energy as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_pv_energy IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_pv_energy > 0
  AND daily_pv_energy < 100
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)

panels.title: PV Generated
panels.description: Total solar energy generated today across all inverters. Resets at midnight.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  MIN(val) as "Today Load (kWh)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_load_energy as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_load_energy IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_load_energy > 0
  AND daily_load_energy < 100
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)

panels.title: Load Consumed
panels.description: Total load energy consumed today across all inverters. Resets at midnight.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  CASE
  WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN
    ROUND((grid_kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
  ELSE
    ROUND((
      CASE
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 100 THEN grid_kwh * 2.9790
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (grid_kwh-100)*3.4864
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (grid_kwh-400)*3.7983
        ELSE                      100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (grid_kwh-650)*4.0948
      END * 1.15
    )::numeric, 2)
  END as "Today Grid Cost (R)"
FROM (
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(val), 0) as grid_kwh
  FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_grid_import as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_grid_import IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_grid_import > 0
  AND daily_grid_import < 500
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)
) g

panels.title: Grid Cost
panels.description: Estimated cost of grid electricity imported today. Calculated using City of Tshwane IBT tariff (incl 15% VAT) or flat rate — switchable via the Cost Calc Mode dropdown.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  CASE
  WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN
    ROUND(((load_kwh - grid_kwh) * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
  ELSE
    ROUND((
      (CASE
        WHEN load_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
        WHEN load_kwh <= 100 THEN load_kwh * 2.9790
        WHEN load_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (load_kwh-100)*3.4864
        WHEN load_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (load_kwh-400)*3.7983
        ELSE                      100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (load_kwh-650)*4.0948
      END
      -
      CASE
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 100 THEN grid_kwh * 2.9790
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (grid_kwh-100)*3.4864
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (grid_kwh-400)*3.7983
        ELSE                      100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (grid_kwh-650)*4.0948
      END) * 1.15
    )::numeric, 2)
  END as "Today Solar Savings (R)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    COALESCE((SELECT MIN(val) FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_load_energy as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_load_energy IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_load_energy > 0
  AND daily_load_energy < 100
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)), 1) as load_kwh,
    COALESCE((SELECT MAX(val) FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_grid_import as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_grid_import IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_grid_import > 0
  AND daily_grid_import < 500
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)), 0) as grid_kwh
) t

panels.title: Solar Savings
panels.description: Estimated savings from solar generation today — the cost you avoided by not importing this energy from the grid.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(latest_pv) as "Total PV (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name,
    pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power, 0) as latest_pv
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND pv1_power IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

panels.title: Peak Solar
panels.description: Peak combined solar output recorded today across all inverters.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(latest_load) as "Total Load (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name,
    load_power as latest_load
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND load_power IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

panels.title: Peak Load
panels.description: Peak combined load recorded today across all inverters.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, inverter_temp
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
AND (SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(inverters), 0) FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}) > 1
AND inverter_temp IS NOT NULL
AND inverter_temp < 100
ORDER BY inverter_name DESC, time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inv 2 Temp
panels.description: Internal temperature of the second inverter's power stage.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) AS time,
  inverter_name,
  AVG(pv1_power + COALESCE(pv2_power,0)) as "PV Power (W)"
FROM solar_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Solar PV Power
panels.description: Solar PV power output over time, one line per inverter. Shows generation profile throughout the day.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  minute AS time,
  AVG(soc)         as "SOC (%)",
  SUM(avg_batt) * -1 as "Battery Power (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('minute', time) as minute,
    inverter_name,
    AVG(battery_soc)   as soc,
    AVG(battery_power) as avg_batt
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
) sub
GROUP BY minute ORDER BY minute

panels.title: Battery Power & SOC
panels.description: Battery charge/discharge power (positive = charging, negative = discharging) and state of charge percentage over time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(latest_grid) as "Grid Power (W)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name,
    grid_power as latest_grid
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND grid_power IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
) sub

panels.title: Grid Power & Voltage
panels.description: Combined grid power draw (W) and grid voltage (V) over time. Power near zero indicates the system is running on solar/battery.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  SUM(val) as "Today PV (kWh)"
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_pv_energy as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_pv_energy IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_pv_energy > 0
  AND daily_pv_energy < 100
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)

panels.title: PV Generated
panels.description: Total solar energy generated this calendar month across all inverters.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  CASE
  WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN
    ROUND((grid_kwh * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
  ELSE
    ROUND((
      CASE
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 100 THEN grid_kwh * 2.9790
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (grid_kwh-100)*3.4864
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (grid_kwh-400)*3.7983
        ELSE                      100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (grid_kwh-650)*4.0948
      END * 1.15
    )::numeric, 2)
  END as "Today Grid Cost (R)"
FROM (
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(val), 0) as grid_kwh
  FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_grid_import as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_grid_import IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_grid_import > 0
  AND daily_grid_import < 500
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)
) g

panels.title: Grid Cost
panels.description: Total grid electricity cost this calendar month using selected tariff.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT NOW() as time,
  CASE
  WHEN '${calc_mode}' = 'flat' THEN
    ROUND(((load_kwh - grid_kwh) * ${rate}::numeric)::numeric, 2)
  ELSE
    ROUND((
      (CASE
        WHEN load_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
        WHEN load_kwh <= 100 THEN load_kwh * 2.9790
        WHEN load_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (load_kwh-100)*3.4864
        WHEN load_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (load_kwh-400)*3.7983
        ELSE                      100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (load_kwh-650)*4.0948
      END
      -
      CASE
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 0   THEN 0
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 100 THEN grid_kwh * 2.9790
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 400 THEN 100*2.9790 + (grid_kwh-100)*3.4864
        WHEN grid_kwh <= 650 THEN 100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + (grid_kwh-400)*3.7983
        ELSE                      100*2.9790 + 300*3.4864 + 250*3.7983 + (grid_kwh-650)*4.0948
      END) * 1.15
    )::numeric, 2)
  END as "Today Solar Savings (R)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    COALESCE((SELECT MIN(val) FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_load_energy as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_load_energy IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_load_energy > 0
  AND daily_load_energy < 100
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)), 1) as load_kwh,
    COALESCE((SELECT MAX(val) FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (inverter_name)
    inverter_name, daily_grid_import as val
  FROM solar_readings
  WHERE time >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg') AT TIME ZONE 'Africa/Johannesburg' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND site_name ILIKE ${site:singlequote}
  AND daily_grid_import IS NOT NULL
  AND daily_grid_import > 0
  AND daily_grid_import < 500
  ORDER BY inverter_name, time DESC
)), 0) as grid_kwh
) t

panels.title: Solar Savings
panels.description: Total solar savings this calendar month — electricity cost avoided through solar generation.

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT site_name FROM solar_readings ORDER BY site_name
list.label: Site
list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT site_name FROM solar_readings ORDER BY site_name

list.definition: SELECT jsonb_array_length(inverters)::text FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE '${site}'
list.label: Inverter Count
list.name: inv_count
list.query: SELECT jsonb_array_length(inverters)::text FROM sites WHERE site_name ILIKE '${site}'
